headline: 30-year-old chain closing all 28 restaurants in April
summary: A very large brand often has trouble growing new concepts because the growth path to making a meaningful impact on the bottom line seems impossible. McDonald's, for example, once held a stake in Chipotle, before selling it in 2006. "By 2005, McDonald’s decided to refocus on its core brand. The ...
